sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111822" key="floi/ac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλοίαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾱκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111822.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φλύαξ</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
